log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Vedalken — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:9+9=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Vedalken — Winged Striker (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Vedalken — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:7+9=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Vedalken — Winged Striker. 7d8+30 necrotic.

→ Vedalken — Winged Striker: CON save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 15 necrotic damage (half).
